result:
Written to `ate-out/T2-files.txt`. Three files:

| File | Action | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| `backend/src/main/java/com/tepeu/agent/tool/SmsTools.java` | **Create** | New `@Component` with `@Tool`-annotated `send_sms` method, following `FileTools`/`ShellTools` pattern |
| `backend/src/main/java/com/tepeu/agent/Tools.java` | **Modify** | Import `SmsTools`, add parameter, call `registry.register("smsTools", smsTools)` |
| `backend/src/test/java/com/tepeu/service/chat/ChatServiceTest.java` | **Modify** | Add `SmsTools` to the `ToolRegistry` built in `setUp()` |

`ChatService` and `AgentOrchestrator` need no changes — the former reads tools exclusively from `ToolRegistry`, and the latter only injects `FileTools`/`ShellTools` for per-turn workspace binding which SMS doesn't need.
